detail.title: Document Detail
detail.processingHint: OCR, extraction and AI analysis in progress.
detail.failedHint: The document could not be processed.
detail.bookedHint: The journal entry has been created.

bookingSuggestion.title: AI Booking Suggestion
bookingSuggestion.rejectConfirm: Are you sure you want to reject this suggestion?

partnerAssignment.title: Partner Assignment
partnerAssignment.fuzzyMatchHint: AI suggests this partner based on a fuzzy match. Please confirm or select a different one.

reviewReasons.lowExtractionHint: AI could not confidently extract data. Please review manually.
reviewReasons.lowBookingHint: Booking suggestion has low confidence. Please check accounts.
reviewReasons.fuzzyPartnerHint: Please confirm or manually assign partner.
reviewReasons.entityMismatchHint: The document may belong to a different entity. Please verify.
reviewReasons.bookingFailedHint: AI could not create suggestion. Manual booking required.
reviewReasons.unresolvedAccountsHint: Suggested account numbers could not be matched.
reviewReasons.aiManualReviewHint: The AI has flagged this document for manual review.
reviewReasons.azureFailedHint: Azure analysis failed. Standard OCR + AI pipeline was used instead.
reviewReasons.azureLowConfidenceHint: Azure returned low confidence results. Standard pipeline was used as fallback.
reviewReasons.azureEmptyText: Azure Document Intelligence returned no text
reviewReasons.azureEmptyTextHint: Azure could not extract any text. Standard OCR pipeline was used instead.
reviewReasons.nativeTextEmptyHint: The document contains no machine-readable text. OCR was attempted.
reviewReasons.nativeTextLowQualityHint: Extracted text quality is low. Please verify extracted data.
reviewReasons.unsupportedContentType: Unsupported file type for Vision OCR
reviewReasons.unsupportedContentTypeHint: This file type cannot be processed with Vision OCR.
reviewReasons.pdfRasterizationFailedHint: The PDF could not be converted to images for OCR processing.
reviewReasons.pdfRasterizationEmpty: PDF image conversion produced no pages
reviewReasons.pdfRasterizationEmptyHint: PDF conversion returned no usable pages for OCR.
reviewReasons.visionOcrEmptyHint: The Vision OCR service could not extract any text from the document.
reviewReasons.visionOcrLowConfidenceHint: Vision OCR returned results with low confidence. Please verify.
reviewReasons.visionOcrPartialPagesHint: Some pages had low OCR confidence. Data may be incomplete.
reviewReasons.visionProviderFallbackHint: Primary Vision provider was unavailable. A fallback provider was used.
reviewReasons.visionOcrTimeoutHint: The Vision OCR service did not respond in time.
reviewReasons.visionOcrFailedHint: The Vision OCR service encountered an error.
reviewReasons.reverseChargeHint: Reverse charge VAT mechanism applies. Please verify tax treatment.
reviewReasons.activationRequiredHint: This expense may need to be capitalized as a fixed asset.
reviewReasons.entertainmentExpenseHint: Entertainment expenses are subject to partial deductibility rules.
reviewReasons.intraCommunityHint: This is an intra-EU transaction. VAT treatment requires verification.
reviewReasons.costCenterSplitHint: The invoice should be allocated across multiple cost centers.
reviewReasons.highConsultingActivationHint: High consulting fees may need to be capitalized as an intangible asset.
reviewReasons.projectAssignmentHint: These costs should be assigned to a project. Please verify project allocation.
reviewReasons.manualReviewRule: Manual review required by booking rule
reviewReasons.manualReviewRuleHint: A booking rule requires manual review of this document.
reviewReasons.ocrQualityIssuesHint: Contradictory or faulty OCR data. Please verify extracted values.
reviewReasons.amountPlausibilityHint: The invoice amount appears inconsistent. Please verify manually.
reviewReasons.taxTreatmentUnclearHint: The correct tax classification could not be determined with certainty.
reviewReasons.multiPeriodAllocationHint: These costs span multiple periods and require accrual accounting.
reviewReasons.intercompanyTransactionHint: Transaction between related companies detected. Please verify transfer pricing.
reviewReasons.duplicateInvoiceHint: This invoice resembles one already recorded. Please check for duplicates.

delete.title: Delete Document
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{fileName}}"?
delete.closedPeriod: The associated journal entry is in a closed fiscal period ({{period}}).
delete.willDeleteDocument: The document and its file will be permanently removed
delete.willDeleteBookingSuggestion: The booking suggestion will be deleted
delete.willReverseJournalEntry: The associated journal entry will be reversed (a reversal entry will be created)
delete.journalEntryAlreadyReversed: The associated journal entry has already been reversed

uploadPage.title: Upload Document
uploadPage.description: Upload invoices and receipts for AI-powered processing

dropzone.idle: Drag & drop a file here, or click to select
dropzone.hint: PDF, JPEG, PNG, or TIFF up to 10MB
